title: Percentage in Progress Tracking that can be adjusted manually especially in "On Progress" Status

posts.author: fauzanrputra (Fauzan Rachmadya Putra)
posts.cookedHtml: If we compare monday.com with another application that is in progress percentage can be adjusted manually. In monday it is possible but can be used only use several status features and then set each weight. But in some project, sometimes each items have different detail steps that why that feature can be used.
